title: pouteria lactescens
intro: Pouteria lactescens, also known as the Babing or Velvet-leaf Pouteria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to tropical regions in Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pouteria lactescens include the potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
